hero.subhead: Senior cloud and CPaaS engineering for enterprises that can't afford to fail.

outcomes.uptimeContext: Hybrid GCP + AWS architecture, Renault Group

services.p1Body: AWS (expert), GCP, Azure. Hybrid topologies, IaC with Terraform, cost & security audits, well-architected reviews.
services.p2Body: Amazon Connect migrations, IVR design, Pinpoint & End-User Messaging.
services.p3Body: Lambda (Node, Python, Java), SNS/SQS, API Gateway, DynamoDB. Decoupled microservices that scale to billions.

servicesPage.subhead: Pick the shape of engagement that fits the work; the standard of delivery doesn't change.
servicesPage.sowBody: Scoped delivery against a defined Statement of Work. Fixed price, fixed timeline, agreed deliverables. Best when the outcome is well understood and the work can be priced up front.
servicesPage.retainerBody: Monthly capacity for advisory or steady delivery. Predictable spend, reserved bandwidth, advisory access between active projects. Best when the road ahead is multi-quarter and priorities will shift.
servicesPage.embeddedBody: Senior architect operating inside the client's team for the duration of the engagement. Full integration with internal rituals, code review, and on-call rotation. Best when ramp-up time matters.
servicesPage.step1Body: A 30-minute call to understand the problem, the team, the constraints, and whether an engagement is the right answer. No commitment on either side.
servicesPage.step2Body: A short written scope: outcomes, boundaries, assumptions, and the engagement model that fits. Reviewed together so there are no surprises later.
servicesPage.step3Body: Master Services Agreement plus a per-engagement Statement of Work. Plain language, signed by both sides. Insurance and confidentiality covered up front.
servicesPage.step4Body: Working session to align on milestones, communication cadence, access, and decision rights. The team meets the architect; questions get answered before code.
servicesPage.step5Body: Iterative delivery against the agreed scope. Weekly written status, demos at milestone gates, async-first communication. Changes go through a light scope-change protocol.
servicesPage.step6Body: Documentation, architecture decision records, and a knowledge-transfer session with the team that will own the work. Optional retainer follows for steady-state support.
servicesPage.bringItem1: Senior expertise: 10+ years architecting and shipping production cloud systems.
servicesPage.bringItem2: Our own equipment, tooling, and remote-work setup.
servicesPage.bringItem4: Written contracts: MSA + SOW for every engagement.
servicesPage.bringItem5: Multi-client perspective informed by enterprise and mid-market work.
servicesPage.dontDoItem1: Unscoped work without a written agreement in place.
servicesPage.dontDoItem2: Hourly arrangements that look like employment.
servicesPage.dontDoItem3: Exclusive engagements; we serve multiple clients to stay sharp.
